name: Elk OS Platform
description: The self-hosting platform itself: compose stack, Directus schema, RAG engine, and the elk-os installer. Analog Elk's flagship internal-platform project — it builds the thing that ships itself.

name: Internal Delivery Portal
description: Employee + client portal surface: task board, sprints, releases, billing, and analytics. Synthetic showcase of Analog Elk running its own delivery on its own CMS.
